name: Computer Forensics
description: Forensic Computing involves the examining and analysing of data retrieved from various computer storage mediums, to be used as evidence in a court of law. Students will develop the skills and knowledge to undertake a forensic computing investigation in a systematic manner utilising existing methods, tools and techniques.

assessment.title: Assessment 1  Reassessment opportunity: Yes, resit exam will replace failed CA components, the Learning Outcomes will be covered in the resit exam
Assessment 2  Reassessment opportunity: Yes, resit exam will replace failed CA components, the Learning Outcomes will be covered in the resit exam
